description: Crystal Spider spawn changes, Holy Staff and Sword balance tweaks, and multiple bug fixes.

sections.heading: Crystal Spider Spawn Changes
items: Crystal Spiders can now spawn directly in the open world
Previously only spawned via upgraded lesser mobs
Increase in overall spawn frequency expected
sections.searchable_text: crystal spider spawn open world might gain increase

subsections.heading: Swords
subsections.searchable_text: broadsword mighty blow nerf resistance removed

sections.heading: Fixes
items: Fixed guild logo color affecting mounts
Fixed building placement issues in Outlands Rests
Corrected hideout entry error message with cluster queue cooldown
Fixed studying T2 items consuming silver without nutrition
Fixed crafting T1 and T2 consuming nutrition incorrectly
Avalonian Construct now correctly counts toward achievement
Various graphical, audio, UI, and localization fixes
sections.searchable_text: bug fixes mount color crafting nutrition hideout error achievement
